care.summary: A compact, variegated pothos cultivar with white and green leaves. Thrives in bright indirect light but tolerates low light; allow soil to dry between waterings.
care.light: Bright indirect to low light; avoid direct sun
care.water: Water when top inch of soil is dry; reduce in winter
care.soil: Well-draining potting mix with perlite or orchid bark
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid fertilizer monthly during spring and summer
care.toxicity: Toxic to pets if ingested (contains calcium oxalate crystals)
common_issues: Loss of variegation in very low light
tips: Prune trailing stems to encourage bushier growth
Provide bright indirect light to maintain white variegation
